name: heartbeatflare
description: Serverless uptime monitor and status page that runs entirely on the Cloudflare free tier.
author: HSGiGa

scripts.dev: npm run wrangler:generate:local && npm run d1:migrate:local && X_LOCAL_EXPLORER=false wrangler dev
scripts.deploy:prod: npm run test && npm run migration:lint && npm run provision && npm run d1:migrate:prod && npm run config:import && npm run deploy && npm run secrets:sync
scripts.d1:migrate:prod: npm run wrangler:generate && wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote
scripts.d1:migrate:local: CI=1 wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --local --persist-to .wrangler/state
scripts.migration:lint: if grep -riE 'DROP TABLE|DROP COLUMN|RENAME COLUMN|RENAME TABLE' migrations/ | grep -v 'lint-ok'; then echo 'ERROR: destructive migration detected — use additive-only schema changes' && exit 1; fi
